programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: (M) Aaron’s father calls the crew to his home in Las Vegas to investigate threatening paranormal activity. He believes he has seen an apparition of a young girl.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Paranormal State
programme.desc: (M) In Ohio, PRS helps a family wondering if their home caused a daughter's death. Ryan finds a discovery that may end the case, yet he struggles to leave without giving answers.

programme.title: History'S Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.
